Bash("/c/Users/Manuel Schwenke/.conda/envs/qOFO/python.exe" -c "
import numpy as np
import pandapower as pp
from network.build_tuda_net import build_tuda_net

# Build network same as run_cascade
net, meta = build_tuda_net\(pv_nodes=True, ext_grid_vm_pu=1.05, load_scaling=1.0\)

print\(''gen vm_pu after build:'', [float\(net.gen.at[g, ''vm_pu'']\) for g in net.gen.index]\)
print\(''gen bus:'', [int\(net.gen.at[g, ''bus'']\) for g in net.gen.index]\)

# Set vm_pu to 1.05 like run_cascade line 516
for g in net.gen.index:
    net.gen.at[g, ''vm_pu''] = 1.05

print\(''gen vm_pu after set to 1.05:'', [float\(net.gen.at[g, ''vm_pu'']\) for g in net.gen.index]\)

# Run power flow with control \(like line 537\)
from pandapower.control import DiscreteTapControl
v_setpoint_pu = 1.05
tol_pu = 0.005
for t3w in meta.coupler_trafo3w_indices:
    DiscreteTapControl\(
        net, element_index=t3w,
        vm_lower_pu=v_setpoint_pu - tol_pu,
        vm_upper_pu=v_setpoint_pu + tol_pu,
        side=''mv'', element=''trafo3w'',
    \)
pp.runpp\(net, run_control=True, calculate_voltage_angles=True\)

# Check gen vm_pu AFTER power flow
print\(''gen vm_pu after runpp:'', [float\(net.gen.at[g, ''vm_pu'']\) for g in net.gen.index]\)

# Check the actual bus voltage at the gen terminal
for g in net.gen.index:
    bus = int\(net.gen.at[g, ''bus'']\)
    print\(f''gen {g} terminal bus {bus} voltage: {float\(net.res_bus.at[bus, ""vm_pu""]\):.6f} pu''\)
    hv_bus_trafo = net.trafo[net.trafo[''lv_bus''] == bus]
    if not hv_bus_trafo.empty:
        hv = int\(hv_bus_trafo.iloc[0][''hv_bus'']\)
        print\(f''  machine trafo HV bus {hv} voltage: {float\(net.res_bus.at[hv, ""vm_pu""]\):.6f} pu''\)
")

Bash("/c/Users/Manuel Schwenke/.conda/envs/qOFO/python.exe" -c "
import warnings; warnings.filterwarnings\(''ignore''\)
import numpy as np
import pandapower as pp
from network.build_tuda_net import build_tuda_net
from sensitivity.jacobian import JacobianSensitivities

net, meta = build_tuda_net\(pv_nodes=True, ext_grid_vm_pu=1.05\)
pp.runpp\(net, calculate_voltage_angles=True\)

# Use same DSO config as run_cascade
coupler_trafos = list\(meta.coupler_trafo3w_indices\)
print\(''Coupler trafo3w indices:'', coupler_trafos\)

# Get DN DER buses for first coupler
dn_buses_all = sorted\(int\(b\) for b in net.bus.index if str\(net.bus.at[b, ''subnet'']\).startswith\(''DN''\)\)
dn_sgens = [s for s in net.sgen.index 
            if int\(net.sgen.at[s, ''bus'']\) in dn_buses_all
            and not str\(net.sgen.at[s, ''name'']\).startswith\(''BOUND_''\)]
dso_der_buses = sorted\(set\(int\(net.sgen.at[s, ''bus'']\) for s in dn_sgens\)\)
print\(''DSO DER buses:'', dso_der_buses[:5], ''...''\)

# Build DSO H matrix \(same as DSO controller does\)
sens = JacobianSensitivities\(net\)

# Check Q_HV sensitivity to DER Q
dQ3w_dQder, t3w_map, der_map = sens.compute_dQtrafo3w_hv_dQ_der_matrix\(
    coupler_trafos, dso_der_buses
\)
print\(f''\\ndQ3w_hv/dQ_der matrix shape: {dQ3w_dQder.shape}''\)
print\(f''t3w_map: {t3w_map}''\)
print\(''First row \(trafo {}\) sensitivities \(first 5 DER\): {}''.format\(
    t3w_map[0], dQ3w_dQder[0, :5]\)\)
print\(''All row sums:'', [dQ3w_dQder[i, :].sum\(\) for i in range\(len\(t3w_map\)\)]\)

# The key question: if DER injects +Q \(generator conv, positive\), 
# does Q_HV go up or down? \(load conv, positive = into HV from bus\)
# dQ3w is negative => positive DER injection REDUCES Q flowing into HV from bus
# That means the TN bus absorbs less Q to push to DN
print\(f''\\nSign check:''\)
print\(f''  dQ_HV/dQ_DER[0,0] = {dQ3w_dQder[0,0]:.4f}''\)
print\(f''  Interpretation: +1 Mvar DER injection causes {dQ3w_dQder[0,0]:.4f} Mvar change in Q_HV \(load conv\)''\)
print\(f''  If negative: DER injection reduces Q flowing from TN into coupler''\)
")

Bash("/c/Users/Manuel Schwenke/.conda/envs/qOFO/python.exe" -c "
import warnings; warnings.filterwarnings\(''ignore''\)
import numpy as np
import pandapower as pp
from network.build_tuda_net import build_tuda_net
from sensitivity.jacobian import JacobianSensitivities
from controller.tso_controller import TSOController, TSOControllerConfig
from controller.base_controller import OFOParameters
from core.network_state import NetworkState
from core.actuator_bounds import ActuatorBounds
import time as time_mod

net, meta = build_tuda_net\(pv_nodes=True, ext_grid_vm_pu=1.05\)
pp.runpp\(net, calculate_voltage_angles=True\)

# Print actual interface Q
for t in meta.coupler_trafo3w_indices:
    q = net.res_trafo3w.at[t, ''q_hv_mvar'']
    print\(f''Initial Q_HV coupler {t}: {q:.2f} Mvar''\)

# Check what the TSO init measurement gives for PCC Q
from run_cascade import _measure_tso
tn_buses = set\(int\(b\) for b in net.bus.index if str\(net.bus.at[b, ''subnet'']\) in \(''TN'', ''GEN_TERM''\)\)
tso_v_buses = sorted\(int\(b\) for b in net.bus.index
    if 300 <= float\(net.bus.at[b, ''vn_kv'']\) < 500 and int\(b\) in tn_buses\)
pcc_trafos = list\(meta.coupler_trafo3w_indices\)
tso_gen_indices = list\(net.gen.index\)
tso_oltc = [t for t in net.trafo.index if net.trafo.at[t, ''tap_pos''] is not None 
            and abs\(float\(net.trafo.at[t, ''tap_max'']\)\) > 0]
tso_der_buses = sorted\(int\(b\) for b in net.bus.index 
                        if str\(net.bus.at[b, ''subnet'']\) == ''TN'' and b in [net.sgen.at[s,''bus''] for s in net.sgen.index if not str\(net.sgen.at[s,''name'']\).startswith\(''BOUND_''\)]\)

tso_config = TSOControllerConfig\(
    der_bus_indices=tso_der_buses,
    pcc_trafo_indices=pcc_trafos,
    gen_indices=tso_gen_indices,
    oltc_trafo_indices=tso_oltc[:1],
    shunt_bus_indices=[2],
    shunt_q_steps_mvar=[50.0],
    voltage_bus_indices=tso_v_buses,
    current_line_indices=[],
    v_min_pu=0.90, v_max_pu=1.10,
    g_v=5000.0,
    v_setpoints_pu=np.full\(len\(tso_v_buses\), 1.05\),
\)

meas = _measure_tso\(net, tso_config, 0\)
print\(f''\\nTSO init measurement - interface_q_hv_side_mvar: {meas.interface_q_hv_side_mvar}''\)
print\(f''TSO init measurement - DER Q: {meas.der_q_mvar}''\)
print\(f''TSO init measurement - gen vm: {meas.gen_vm_pu}''\)
")

Bash("/c/Users/Manuel Schwenke/.conda/envs/qOFO/python.exe" -c "
import warnings; warnings.filterwarnings\(''ignore''\)
import numpy as np
import pandapower as pp
from network.build_tuda_net import build_tuda_net
from sensitivity.jacobian import JacobianSensitivities
from run_cascade import run_cascade, _measure_dso
from controller.dso_controller import DSOController, DSOControllerConfig
from controller.base_controller import OFOParameters
from core.actuator_bounds import ActuatorBounds

net, meta = build_tuda_net\(pv_nodes=True, ext_grid_vm_pu=1.05\)
pp.runpp\(net, calculate_voltage_angles=True\)

coupler_trafos = list\(meta.coupler_trafo3w_indices\)
dn_buses_all = sorted\(int\(b\) for b in net.bus.index if str\(net.bus.at[b, ''subnet'']\).startswith\(''DN''\)\)
dn_sgens = [s for s in net.sgen.index 
            if int\(net.sgen.at[s, ''bus'']\) in dn_buses_all
            and not str\(net.sgen.at[s, ''name'']\).startswith\(''BOUND_''\)]
dso_der_buses = sorted\(set\(int\(net.sgen.at[s, ''bus'']\) for s in dn_sgens\)\)
dso_oltc = list\(meta.coupler_trafo3w_indices\)
dso_shunt_buses = sorted\(set\(int\(net.bus.at[b, ''name''].split\(''|''\)[1].replace\(''Bus_'',''''\)\)
    for b in net.bus.index if ''tert'' in str\(net.bus.at[b, ''name'']\).lower\(\)\) 
    if any\(''tert'' in str\(net.bus.at[b, ''name'']\).lower\(\) for b in net.bus.index\) else []\)

# Try to get the actual DSO config from run_cascade
result = run_cascade\(n_minutes=1, tso_period_min=3, dso_period_min=1,
                     v_setpoint_pu=1.05, verbose=False, live_plot=False,
                     g_v=5000, g_q=1.0\)
dso_cfg = result.dso_config

print\(f''DSO config:''\)
print\(f''  der_bus_indices: {dso_cfg.der_bus_indices}''\)
print\(f''  oltc_trafo_indices: {dso_cfg.oltc_trafo_indices}''\)
print\(f''  shunt_bus_indices: {dso_cfg.shunt_bus_indices}''\)
print\(f''  interface_trafo_indices: {dso_cfg.interface_trafo_indices}''\)
print\(f''  voltage_bus_indices: {dso_cfg.voltage_bus_indices[:5]}...''\)
print\(f''  current_line_indices: {dso_cfg.current_line_indices[:5]}...''\)
print\(f''  v_min={dso_cfg.v_min_pu}, v_max={dso_cfg.v_max_pu}, i_max={dso_cfg.i_max_pu}''\)

# Build full H matrix like DSO does
sens = JacobianSensitivities\(net\)
H, mappings = sens.build_sensitivity_matrix_H\(
    der_bus_indices=dso_cfg.der_bus_indices,
    observation_bus_indices=dso_cfg.voltage_bus_indices,
    line_indices=dso_cfg.current_line_indices,
    trafo3w_indices=dso_cfg.interface_trafo_indices,
    oltc_trafo3w_indices=dso_cfg.oltc_trafo_indices,
    shunt_bus_indices=dso_cfg.shunt_bus_indices,
    shunt_q_steps_mvar=[50.0]*len\(dso_cfg.shunt_bus_indices\),
\)
print\(f''\\nH shape: {H.shape}''\)
print\(f''mappings: {list\(mappings.keys\(\)\)}''\)

n_q = len\(dso_cfg.interface_trafo_indices\)
n_v = len\(dso_cfg.voltage_bus_indices\)
n_i = len\(dso_cfg.current_line_indices\)
n_der = len\(dso_cfg.der_bus_indices\)
print\(f''n_q={n_q}, n_v={n_v}, n_i={n_i}, n_der={n_der}''\)
print\(f''\\nQ rows \(H[:n_q, :n_der]\):''\)
print\(H[:n_q, :n_der]\)
print\(f''\\nV rows first DER col \(H[n_q:n_q+n_v, 0]\):''\)
print\(H[n_q:n_q+n_v, 0]\)
print\(f''\\nV rows first DER col range: min={H[n_q:n_q+n_v, :n_der].min\(\):.6f}, max={H[n_q:n_q+n_v, :n_der].max\(\):.6f}''\)
")

Bash("/c/Users/Manuel Schwenke/.conda/envs/qOFO/python.exe" -c "
import warnings; warnings.filterwarnings\(''ignore''\)
import numpy as np
from run_cascade import run_cascade
from sensitivity.jacobian import JacobianSensitivities
import pandapower as pp
from network.build_tuda_net import build_tuda_net

# Get DSO config from run_cascade
result = run_cascade\(n_minutes=1, tso_period_min=3, dso_period_min=1,
                     v_setpoint_pu=1.05, verbose=False, live_plot=False,
                     g_v=5000, g_q=1.0\)
dso_cfg = result.dso_config

net, meta = build_tuda_net\(pv_nodes=True, ext_grid_vm_pu=1.05\)
pp.runpp\(net, calculate_voltage_angles=True\)

sens = JacobianSensitivities\(net\)
H, mappings = sens.build_sensitivity_matrix_H\(
    der_bus_indices=dso_cfg.der_bus_indices,
    observation_bus_indices=dso_cfg.voltage_bus_indices,
    line_indices=dso_cfg.current_line_indices,
    trafo3w_indices=dso_cfg.interface_trafo_indices,
    oltc_trafo3w_indices=dso_cfg.oltc_trafo_indices,
    shunt_bus_indices=dso_cfg.shunt_bus_indices,
    shunt_q_steps_mvar=dso_cfg.shunt_q_steps_mvar,
\)
print\(f''H shape: {H.shape}''\)

n_q = len\(dso_cfg.interface_trafo_indices\)
n_v = len\(dso_cfg.voltage_bus_indices\)
n_i = len\(dso_cfg.current_line_indices\)
n_der = len\(dso_cfg.der_bus_indices\)
print\(f''n_q={n_q}, n_v={n_v}, n_i={n_i}, n_der={n_der}''\)

# Q rows - these are what the DSO gradient uses
print\(f''\\n--- Q rows \(interface Q sensitivity to DER Q\) ---''\)
print\(f''H[:n_q, :n_der] =''\)
print\(H[:n_q, :n_der]\)

# V rows - check what voltage outputs look like
print\(f''\\n--- V rows summary \(dV/dQ_DER\) ---''\)
V_block = H[n_q:n_q+n_v, :n_der]
print\(f''Min: {V_block.min\(\):.6f}, Max: {V_block.max\(\):.6f}, Mean: {V_block.mean\(\):.6f}''\)
print\(f''All positive? {\(V_block >= 0\).all\(\)}''\)

# Check: what are the actual DN voltages?
dso_v_buses = dso_cfg.voltage_bus_indices
print\(f''\\n--- DN voltages ---''\)
for b in dso_v_buses:
    print\(f''  Bus {b}: V = {net.res_bus.at[b, ""vm_pu""]:.4f}''\)

# The key: is the output constraint y_current + alpha*H*w < y_upper
# binding? If DN voltages are near v_max \(1.1\), the constraint forces
# DER Q negative. But if they''re around 1.04, there''s room.
")

Bash("/c/Users/Manuel Schwenke/.conda/envs/qOFO/python.exe" -c "
import warnings; warnings.filterwarnings\(''ignore''\)
import numpy as np
from run_cascade import run_cascade

# Monkey-patch the DSO controller to print gradient info
from controller.dso_controller import DSOController
from controller.base_controller import BaseOFOController

original_step = BaseOFOController.step

def debug_step\(self, measurement\):
    if ''dso'' in self.controller_id.lower\(\):
        # Print gradient
        grad_f = self._compute_objective_gradient\(measurement\)
        H = self._build_sensitivity_matrix\(\)
        y_current = self._extract_outputs\(measurement\)
        n_q = len\(self.config.interface_trafo_indices\)
        n_v = len\(self.config.voltage_bus_indices\)
        
        print\(f''  DSO debug [iter {self.iteration}]:''\)
        print\(f''    grad_f \(DER part\) = {grad_f[:6]}''\)
        print\(f''    u_current \(DER\) = {self._u_current[:6]}''\)
        print\(f''    Q_actual = {y_current[:n_q]}''\)
        print\(f''    Q_setpoint = {self.q_setpoint_mvar}''\)
    
    result = original_step\(self, measurement\)
    
    if ''dso'' in self.controller_id.lower\(\):
        print\(f''    sigma \(DER\) = {result.u_new[:6] - \(self._u_current[:6] - 0.03 * np.zeros\(6\)\)}''\)
        print\(f''    u_new \(DER\) = {result.u_new[:6]}''\)
    
    return result

BaseOFOController.step = debug_step

result = run_cascade\(n_minutes=6, tso_period_min=3, dso_period_min=1,
                     v_setpoint_pu=1.05, verbose=False, live_plot=False,
                     g_v=5000, g_q=1.0\)
")

Bash("/c/Users/Manuel Schwenke/.conda/envs/qOFO/python.exe" -c "
import warnings; warnings.filterwarnings\(''ignore''\)
import numpy as np
from run_cascade import run_cascade
from controller.base_controller import BaseOFOController
from optimisation.miqp_solver import build_miqp_problem

original_step = BaseOFOController.step

def debug_step\(self, measurement\):
    if ''dso'' in self.controller_id.lower\(\) and self.iteration == 5:
        grad_f = self._compute_objective_gradient\(measurement\)
        H = self._build_sensitivity_matrix\(\)
        y_current = self._extract_outputs\(measurement\)
        der_p = self._extract_der_active_power\(measurement\)
        u_lower, u_upper = self._compute_input_bounds\(der_p\)
        y_lower, y_upper = self._get_output_limits\(\)
        
        n_q = len\(self.config.interface_trafo_indices\)
        n_v = len\(self.config.voltage_bus_indices\)
        n_der = len\(self.config.der_bus_indices\)
        
        print\(f''=== DSO MIQP DEBUG at iter 5 ===''\)
        print\(f''u_current = {self._u_current}''\)
        print\(f''u_lower = {u_lower}''\)
        print\(f''u_upper = {u_upper}''\)
        print\(f''''\)
        print\(f''y_current \(Q\) = {y_current[:n_q]}''\)
        print\(f''y_lower   \(Q\) = {y_lower[:n_q]}''\)
        print\(f''y_upper   \(Q\) = {y_upper[:n_q]}''\)
        print\(f''''\)
        print\(f''y_current \(V\) = {y_current[n_q:n_q+n_v]}''\)
        print\(f''y_lower   \(V\) = {y_lower[n_q:n_q+n_v]}''\)
        print\(f''y_upper   \(V\) = {y_upper[n_q:n_q+n_v]}''\)
        
        # Check which constraints are close to binding
        alpha = self.params.alpha
        slack_v = y_upper[n_q:n_q+n_v] - y_current[n_q:n_q+n_v]
        slack_v_lo = y_current[n_q:n_q+n_v] - y_lower[n_q:n_q+n_v]
        print\(f''''\)
        print\(f''V slack to upper: {slack_v}''\)
        print\(f''V slack to lower: {slack_v_lo}''\)
        print\(f''Tightest V upper slack: {slack_v.min\(\):.4f} at bus idx {slack_v.argmin\(\)}''\)
        print\(f''Tightest V lower slack: {slack_v_lo.min\(\):.4f} at bus idx {slack_v_lo.argmin\(\)}''\)
        
        # Check: if w = -20 \(aggressive decrease\), what happens to V?
        # V_new = V_current + alpha * H_v * w
        # H_v rows: dV/dQ_DER > 0 for all
        # w < 0 => V decreases => moves away from v_max, toward v_min
        # With V around 1.03-1.06 and v_min=0.9, no lower bound issues
        
        print\(f''''\)
        print\(f''H_V first row: {H[n_q, :n_der]}''\)
        print\(f''Sum of H_V for each DER: {H[n_q:n_q+n_v, :n_der].sum\(axis=0\)}''\)
        
        # Also check the output constraints for I
        n_i = len\(self.config.current_line_indices\)
        if n_i > 0:
            slack_i = y_upper[n_q+n_v:] - y_current[n_q+n_v:]
            print\(f''''\)
            print\(f''y_current \(I\) = {y_current[n_q+n_v:]}''\)
            print\(f''y_upper   \(I\) = {y_upper[n_q+n_v:]}''\)
            print\(f''I slack to upper: {slack_i}''\)
            print\(f''Tightest I upper slack: {slack_i.min\(\):.4f} at line idx {slack_i.argmin\(\)}''\)
    
    return original_step\(self, measurement\)

BaseOFOController.step = debug_step

result = run_cascade\(n_minutes=6, tso_period_min=3, dso_period_min=1,
                     v_setpoint_pu=1.05, verbose=False, live_plot=False,
                     g_v=5000, g_q=1.0\)
")

Bash("/c/Users/Manuel Schwenke/.conda/envs/qOFO/python.exe" -c "
import warnings; warnings.filterwarnings\(''ignore''\)
import numpy as np

# Design g_w from desired step sizes
alpha = 0.01

# Desired per-step changes:
# V_gen:     ~0.002 p.u. per step  
# Q_PCC_set: ~2 Mvar per step
# Q_DER:     ~1 Mvar per step  
# s_OLTC:    ~0.5 taps per step \(so it takes 2 steps\)
# s_shunt:   ~0.3 states per step

# Approximate gradients \(from the voltage tracking objective with g_v=5000\):
# grad\(V_gen\) ~ 2 * 5000 * 6 * 0.02 * 0.5 = 600
# grad\(Q_PCC\) ~ 2 * 5000 * 6 * 0.02 * 0.0001 = 0.12  \(VERY SMALL!\)
# grad\(Q_DER\) ~ 2 * 5000 * 6 * 0.02 * 0.00002 = 0.024 \(TINY!\)
# grad\(s_OLTC\)~ 2 * 5000 * 6 * 0.02 * 0.01 = 12
# grad\(s_shunt\)~2 * 5000 * 6 * 0.02 * 0.001 = 1.2

# Desired: Δu = alpha * w = alpha * \(-grad / \(2*g_w\)\)
# So: g_w = alpha * |grad| / \(2 * Δu_desired\)

def calc_gw\(alpha, grad, delta_u_desired\):
    return alpha * abs\(grad\) / \(2 * delta_u_desired\)

print\(''Actuator       | grad    | Δu_desired | g_w needed''\)
print\(''-'' * 55\)

g_Vgen = calc_gw\(alpha, 600, 0.002\)
print\(f''V_gen          | 600     | 0.002 p.u. | {g_Vgen:.1f}''\)

g_QPCC = calc_gw\(alpha, 0.12, 2.0\)
print\(f''Q_PCC_set      | 0.12    | 2.0 Mvar   | {g_QPCC:.6f}''\)

g_QDER_tso = calc_gw\(alpha, 0.024, 1.0\)
print\(f''Q_DER \(TSO\)    | 0.024   | 1.0 Mvar   | {g_QDER_tso:.6f}''\)

g_OLTC = calc_gw\(alpha, 12, 0.5\)
print\(f''s_OLTC         | 12      | 0.5 taps   | {g_OLTC:.3f}''\)

g_shunt = calc_gw\(alpha, 1.2, 0.3\)
print\(f''s_shunt        | 1.2     | 0.3 states | {g_shunt:.3f}''\)

print\(\)
print\(''The Q_PCC gradient \(0.12\) is tiny because dV/dQ_PCC ~ 0.0001.''\)
print\(''With g_w = 0.0003, w* = -0.12/\(2*0.0003\) = -200''\)
print\(''Δu = 0.01 * \(-200\) = -2 Mvar. OK!''\)
print\(\)
print\(''But this means Q_PCC has almost no penalty on change size.''\)
print\(''The output constraints \(via H and y_limits\) will dominate.''\)
print\(\)
print\(''INSIGHT: The small Q_PCC sensitivity means the TSO voltage''\)
print\(''tracking barely moves Q_PCC. Instead V_gen and OLTC do most work.''\)
print\(''This is actually physically correct — Q_PCC has weak voltage effect.''\)
print\(\)
print\(''The Q_PCC_set is more meaningful as a virtual actuator for TSO-DSO''\)
print\(''coordination. It needs its OWN tracking objective, not just voltage.''\)
")

import warnings; warnings.filterwarnings\(''ignore''\)
import numpy as np

alpha = 0.01

def calc_gw\(alpha, grad, delta_u_desired\):
    return alpha * abs\(grad\) / \(2 * delta_u_desired\)

print\(''Actuator       | grad    | du_desired | g_w needed''\)
g_Vgen = calc_gw\(alpha, 600, 0.002\)
print\(f''V_gen          | 600     | 0.002 p.u. | {g_Vgen:.1f}''\)
g_QPCC = calc_gw\(alpha, 0.12, 2.0\)
print\(f''Q_PCC_set      | 0.12    | 2.0 Mvar   | {g_QPCC:.6f}''\)
g_QDER_tso = calc_gw\(alpha, 0.024, 1.0\)
print\(f''Q_DER \(TSO\)    | 0.024   | 1.0 Mvar   | {g_QDER_tso:.6f}''\)
g_OLTC = calc_gw\(alpha, 12, 0.5\)
print\(f''s_OLTC         | 12      | 0.5 taps   | {g_OLTC:.3f}''\)
g_shunt = calc_gw\(alpha, 1.2, 0.3\)
print\(f''s_shunt        | 1.2     | 0.3 states | {g_shunt:.3f}''\)
print\(\)
print\(f''Recommended TSO g_w: V_gen={g_Vgen:.0f}, Q_PCC={g_QPCC:.6f}, OLTC={g_OLTC:.2f}, shunt={g_shunt:.2f}''\)
print\(f''Note: Q_PCC g_w is very small because PCC has tiny voltage sensitivity.''\)
print\(f''The voltage tracking gradient barely drives Q_PCC.''\)
print\(\)
print\(''Better approach: use moderate g_w to prevent oscillation and''\)
print\(''rely on the cascaded TSO-DSO loop for Q_PCC evolution.''\)
print\(\)
print\(''Recommended:''\)
print\(f''  g_w\(Q_DER_tso\) = 0.001''\)
print\(f''  g_w\(Q_PCC\)     = 0.001''\)
print\(f''  g_w\(V_gen\)     = {g_Vgen:.0f}''\)
print\(f''  g_w\(s_OLTC\)    = {g_OLTC:.1f}''\)
print\(f''  g_w\(s_shunt\)   = {g_shunt:.1f}''\)
")

Bash("/c/Users/Manuel Schwenke/.conda/envs/qOFO/python.exe" -c "
import numpy as np
from run_cascade import run_cascade

# Monkey-patch to inspect the MIQP problem at iteration 2
import controller.base_controller as bc
orig_step = bc.BaseController.step

def patched_step\(self, measurement\):
    if ''dso'' in self.controller_id.lower\(\) and self.iteration == 2:
        # Run the normal step but intercept the MIQP problem
        from optimisation.miqp_solver import build_miqp_problem
        y_current = self._extract_outputs\(measurement\)
        der_p = self._extract_der_active_power\(measurement\)
        u_lower, u_upper = self._compute_input_bounds\(der_p\)
        y_lower, y_upper = self._get_output_limits\(\)
        grad_f = self._compute_objective_gradient\(measurement\)
        H = self._build_sensitivity_matrix\(\)
        problem = build_miqp_problem\(
            alpha=self.params.alpha, u_current=self._u_current,
            y_current=y_current, H=H, grad_f=grad_f,
            u_lower=u_lower, u_upper=u_upper,
            y_lower=y_lower, y_upper=y_upper,
            g_w=self.params.g_w, g_u=self.params.g_u,
            g_z=self.params.g_z,
            integer_indices=self._integer_indices\)

        nc = problem.n_continuous
        ni = problem.n_integer
        H_i = problem.H_tilde[:, nc:]
        # Check: if shunt 0 \(index 3 in integer vec\) steps to 1
        for s in range\(3\):
            shunt_col = 3 + s  # shunt indices in integer vec
            dy = H_i[:, shunt_col] * 1.0  # direct state change of 1
            y_new = y_current + dy
            print\(f''  Shunt {s}: dy from 1-step = {np.array2string\(dy, precision=3\)}''\)
            print\(f''    y_current = {np.array2string\(y_current, precision=4\)}''\)
            print\(f''    y_after   = {np.array2string\(y_new, precision=4\)}''\)
            print\(f''    y_lower   = {np.array2string\(y_lower, precision=4\)}''\)
            print\(f''    y_upper   = {np.array2string\(y_upper, precision=4\)}''\)
            # Check violations
            viol_lo = np.maximum\(y_lower - y_new, 0\)
            viol_hi = np.maximum\(y_new - y_upper, 0\)
            if np.any\(viol_lo > 0\):
                idx = np.where\(viol_lo > 0\)[0]
                print\(f''    LOWER violations at {idx}: {viol_lo[idx]}''\)
            if np.any\(viol_hi > 0\):
                idx = np.where\(viol_hi > 0\)[0]
                print\(f''    UPPER violations at {idx}: {viol_hi[idx]}''\)
            if not np.any\(viol_lo > 0\) and not np.any\(viol_hi > 0\):
                print\(f''    No output constraint violations!''\)

    return orig_step\(self, measurement\)

bc.BaseController.step = patched_step

result = run_cascade\(v_setpoint_pu=1.03, n_minutes=3,
                     tso_period_min=3, dso_period_min=1, verbose=False,
                     g_v=100000, g_q=2, use_profiles=False\)
")

import numpy as np
from run_cascade import run_cascade
import controller.base_controller as bc
orig_step = bc.BaseOFOController.step

def patched_step\(self, measurement\):
    if ''dso'' in self.controller_id.lower\(\) and self.iteration == 2:
        from optimisation.miqp_solver import build_miqp_problem
        y_current = self._extract_outputs\(measurement\)
        der_p = self._extract_der_active_power\(measurement\)
        u_lower, u_upper = self._compute_input_bounds\(der_p\)
        y_lower, y_upper = self._get_output_limits\(\)
        grad_f = self._compute_objective_gradient\(measurement\)
        H = self._build_sensitivity_matrix\(\)
        problem = build_miqp_problem\(
            alpha=self.params.alpha, u_current=self._u_current,
            y_current=y_current, H=H, grad_f=grad_f,
            u_lower=u_lower, u_upper=u_upper,
            y_lower=y_lower, y_upper=y_upper,
            g_w=self.params.g_w, g_u=self.params.g_u,
            g_z=self.params.g_z,
            integer_indices=self._integer_indices\)
        nc = problem.n_continuous
        H_i = problem.H_tilde[:, nc:]
        n_out = len\(y_current\)
        # Check shunts \(last 3 in integer vec\)
        for s in range\(3\):
            shunt_col = 3 + s
            dy = H_i[:, shunt_col] * 1.0
            y_new = y_current + dy
            print\(f''  Shunt {s}: dy from 1-step:''\)
            for k in range\(n_out\):
                flag = ''''
                if y_new[k] < y_lower[k]: flag = '' ** LOWER VIOLATION **''
                if y_new[k] > y_upper[k]: flag = '' ** UPPER VIOLATION **''
                if flag or abs\(dy[k]\) > 0.001:
                    print\(f''    y[{k}]: {y_current[k]:.4f} + {dy[k]:+.4f} = {y_new[k]:.4f}  [{y_lower[k]:.2f}, {y_upper[k]:.2f}]{flag}''\)
    return orig_step\(self, measurement\)

bc.BaseOFOController.step = patched_step
result = run_cascade\(v_setpoint_pu=1.03, n_minutes=3,
                     tso_period_min=3, dso_period_min=1, verbose=False,
                     g_v=100000, g_q=2, use_profiles=False\)
")

        shunt = rec.dso_shunt_states if rec.dso_shunt_states is not None else np.zeros\(3\)
        oltc = rec.dso_oltc_taps if rec.dso_oltc_taps is not None else np.zeros\(3\)
        q_set = rec.dso_q_setpoint_mvar if rec.dso_q_setpoint_mvar is not None else np.zeros\(3\)
        q_act = rec.dso_q_interface_mvar if rec.dso_q_interface_mvar is not None else np.zeros\(3\)
        print\(f''{t:5d}  {q_der:+10.1f}  {np.array2string\(shunt, precision=0\):>15s}  {np.array2string\(oltc, precision=0\):>15s}  {np.array2string\(q_set, precision=1\):>25s}  {np.array2string\(q_act, precision=1\):>25s}''\)
")
